raw:
ISSUES:
- [severity:info] KiiPS-UI/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/jsp/kiips/COM/COMM_POPUP_IL0429_PRTVIEW_P.jsp:413 - Use of ES6 'let' might cause compatibility issues if the system still requires IE11 support, which is common in legacy financial environments.
- [severity:info] KiiPS-UI/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/jsp/kiips/COM/COMM_POPUP_IL0429_PRTVIEW_P.jsp:417 - Direct concatenation of 'upDownVal' into an HTML string is a potential XSS vector, although it follows the existing pattern in this file and the value is typically a restricted indicator character.

VERDICT: looks-good
SUMMARY: The change correctly implements conditional color styling (Red for Up, Blue for Down) for financial indicators and improves UI centering in the print popup.

issues.text: KiiPS-UI/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/jsp/kiips/COM/COMM_POPUP_IL0429_PRTVIEW_P.jsp:413 - Use of ES6 'let' might cause compatibility issues if the system still requires IE11 support, which is common in legacy financial environments.

KiiPS-UI/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/jsp/kiips/COM/COMM_POPUP_IL0429_PRTVIEW_P.jsp:417 - Direct concatenation of 'upDownVal' into an HTML string is a potential XSS vector, although it follows the existing pattern in this file and the value is typically a restricted indicator character.

summary: The change correctly implements conditional color styling (Red for Up, Blue for Down) for financial indicators and improves UI centering in the print popup.
